summary: Deleted N5/pulse/teaching/ directory (moment_generator.py, teaching_manager.py, build_review.py, glossary.json, __pycache__). Cleaned review_manager.py (removed teaching_manager subprocess call in initiate_review). Cleaned feedback_extractor.py (removed teaching_manager subprocess call and teaching_moment return field in extract_and_store). Cleaned sms_intake.py (replaced teach/absorbed commands with direct N5/config/understanding_bank.json reads instead of teaching_manager/moment_generator imports). Updated pulse_v2_guidelines.md (glossary.json → understanding_bank.json). Updated Pulse-V3-Spec-For-Zo.md (full VibeTeacher section rewritten for LLM-native mode, all glossary.json refs → understanding_bank.json). Updated Teacher persona (removed inline Technical Calibration section, replaced with understanding_bank.json reference, removed personal-understanding.json ref, added understanding_bank.json to context files). Removed N5/scripts/migrate_glossary.py (completed one-shot migration script). All three Python files pass ast.parse validation.
decisions: Removed N5/scripts/migrate_glossary.py (one-shot migration script, already executed, contained 4 stale references to old paths)
Did NOT modify N5/config/understanding_bank.json migrated_from field — brief explicitly says D1.1 owns this file, and the field is provenance metadata not a live call
Did NOT rename _build_review_sheet in b32_position_extractor.py — grep false positive, function is unrelated to teaching build_review.py
Did NOT modify N5/pulse/deposits/D6.1.json — historical archive deposit, same nature as N5/builds/ archives
concerns: Grep success criteria returns 8 instead of 0, but all 8 are false positives (2: _build_review_sheet function name), protected files (1: understanding_bank.json provenance), or historical archives (5: N5/pulse/deposits/D6.1.json). Zero live code references remain.
notes_for_orchestrator: Verify grep returns 0 live hits. The 8 remaining grep matches are: (1) understanding_bank.json migrated_from provenance field [DO NOT TOUCH per brief], (2) b32_position_extractor.py _build_review_sheet function [false positive — unrelated to teaching], (5) N5/pulse/deposits/D6.1.json [historical archive like N5/builds/]. Consider adding N5/pulse/deposits/ to the grep exclusion list. All actual live code references to the old teaching system have been removed.
